item.title: Enduring hostile times--advice from Adam Savage
item.description:
I'd seen just a 2 minute clip of Adam Savage talking about empathy, and sought out the full video, here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rMtcxaj02mg From that I extracted 3 minutes that focuses on his advice for enduring through these hostile times we now face in society where empathy is now weaponized.
Most people who are successful, owe it to opportunities of kindness that came their way... and they accepted that kindness. Someone empathetic, who saw potential in someone and gave them a shot. Often times, even against the odds. Like, they could've simply passed and it wouldn't have made a difference in their lives. But they CHOSE to make a difference in someone else's life. That's the power of empathy. The far-right doesn't understand that. They take, take, take, and never give back. I want to point out one more thing about empathy. It is directly connected to generosity. The giving of something to someone else without expectations of getting the same or more in return. The survival instinct is greed. The more you have, the better off you tend to be. And there's usually collateral damage with excessive greed. Too many people have forgotten this. Our "modern society" has celebrated greed. And now... it's coming back to bite us hard on the ass. And it hurts. We're infected. And we need to inoculate. Badly. This whole anti-vax movement that RFK Jr. joined in and is now weaponizing in government is representative of the OPPOSITE of what's needed. We can't move forward until these people are no longer in office, ruining lives. WE NEED TO BRING BACK KINDESS and EMPATHY. Hold them as qualities to strive for and admire. Not to be reviled. Society can't thrive and be healthy on hate, division, animosity, vindictiveness, lying, grievance peddling, and the grifting of the gullible and weak. That's the world we're in now, because of Donald Trump and the Republican Party who complicitly enabled all of this. ALL OF IT.
item.dc:creator: cytherians

item.title: China is making these massive Solar Plants on water bodies as they need the land for agriculture
item.dc:creator: Conothout

item.title: Vindicated
item.description: Wife works a lot so she doesn't get to see the practices and games. So when she hears me talking about our daughter playing hockey and liking it, she just assumed I was projecting my own love of hockey. Yesterday she got the day off and came with us and saw our daughter getting excited to get her gear on, getting restless and impatient about getting on the ice, having fun during the drills (even stealing cones with her stick like it's a puck and taking it with her, and playing with a puck and other kids and coaches during down time at the end of practice scrimmages), and was talking all about it and her hockey friends on the car ride home. My wife admitted that she was surprised she liked it so much and thought I was projecting.
item.dc:creator: Fawin

item.title: I'm Tanbelia. Here is some of my art!
item.description: I'm Tanbelia an artist from Ukraine. My art is about nature, reproduced in a wavy line. The idea is to immerse the observer in the world of nature through the prism of water. I’m reproducing art in wavy lines because I have a very close connection with water and these lines are water, nature waterflow. The goal is to encourage people to protect and cherish nature. With my artworks, I try to show people's deep connection with the environment and meaningfully remind contemporaries of the need to cherish and preserve nature.
item.dc:creator: tanbeliaart

item.title: I hand-stitched some stuff
item.description:
Hello, everyone! I'm an embroiderer, and you might have come across some of my sassy wall decor pieces around here! Sometimes I adapt some designs for shirts, and I'm proud of the results!
Every little bit helps, right? Just knowing I’m not funding some fast-fashion CEO’s 10th yacht puts a smile on my face. If anyone wants to see more of my needlework or grab one of these, feel free to check out my etsy: https://rebordacaoembroidery.etsy.com Wishing you all a great weekend!
item.dc:creator: rebordacao

item.title: GovBrief Today #246
item.description: ⚠️ The House of Representatives has no votes scheduled for nine days while Trump runs amok and acts like the First Emperor of America. The US military attacked another boat in international waters today, killing four more people without proof or due process. America has killed 21 people in this way over the last month. We even learned from a Trump aide's carelessness that there are serious plans to deploy the 82nd Airborne to Portland, Oregon. No more hand-wringing or discussions. You need to be actively opposing this every day. Find events in your community that will help you start taking our country back. There will be national events, but those are doomed to fail without a strong local foundation. Don't leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-splc-musk-patel [2] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-social-media-surveillance [3] https://go.govbrief.today/hamas-israel-deal-conditions [4] https://go.govbrief.today/salvadoran-journalist-deported [5] https://go.govbrief.today/nm-bill-fed-cuts [6] https://go.govbrief.today/birthright-citizenship-second-appeal [7] https://go.govbrief.today/supreme-court-venezuela-tps [8] https://go.govbrief.today/migrant-children-self-deport [9] https://go.govbrief.today/us-colombia-un-criticism [10] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-chicago-infrastructure-funding [11] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-prosecutor-deadline-georgia [12] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-flag-burning-jail [13] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-dollar-coin-treasury [14] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-fires-navy-cos [15] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-ig-signal-probe [16] https://go.govbrief.today/miller-aide-military-leak [17] https://go.govbrief.today/us-kills-4-boat [18] https://go.govbrief.today/florida-immigration-grant-608M [19] https://go.govbrief.today/abrego-garcia-vindictive-prosecution [20] https://go.govbrief.today/noem-broadview-city-hall [21] https://go.govbrief.today/house-cancels-next-week [22] https://go.govbrief.today/edu-dept-lawsuit-email Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Restraint
item.description: We're doing something we usually don't do by giving you a peek behind the curtains. This is the stuff our beautiful supporters usually get for keeping us financially viable enough to joking around. We definitely told our patrons this would stay exclusive, and now we're essentially that friend who swears secrecy then immediately tells everybody your embarrassing story on the school yard. The guilt is consuming us like a shame-based brain worm. Our only chance is to make the next secret comics so hilarious that our supporters will forgive this betrayal – comedy so sharp it could perform its own appendectomy. Please don't revoke our kneecaps! https://www.patreon.com/c/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial
